g.text: Upper triangle: unit | Lower triangle: unit_obs.

text.style: font-size: 13.20px; font-weight: bold; fill: #2B2B2B; font-family: sans;

g.text: Ellipse shape shows the sign and strength of the point estimate.
Upper triangle shows unit; lower triangle shows unit_obs.
Black cell outlines/stars mark supplied intervals that exclude zero.
Matrix-style views are summaries, not posterior density displays.
